msItem.title: Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension)
Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), No item: chapter: Tahsas
Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), No item: chapter: TahIntroduction
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ ወርኃ፡ ታኅሣሥ፡ ቡሩክ፡ መዓልቱ፡ ፱ ሰዓት። ወእምዝ፡ ይትዌሰክ፡

explicit.foreign: Eorum benedictio sit cum Rege nostro Jasu, in saecula saeculorum! Amen.
explicit.note: It is not clear whether the king mentioned is ʾIyāsu I or ʾIyāsu II.

msItem.title: Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), No item: chapter: Tah30

msItem.explicit: ተፈጸመ፡ ወርኃ፡ ታኅሣሥ፡ ቡሩክ፡ በሥምረተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወበፈቃደ፡ ወልደ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ወበፍቅረ፡ መንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ጰራቅሊጦስ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን፡ ለይኩን፡ ለይኩን፡

msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ ወርኃ፡ የካቲት፡ ቡሩክ፡ መዓልቱ፡ ፲ወ፩ ሰዓት፡ ወእምዝ፡ ይትዌሰክ፡ አመ፡ ፩፡ ለየካቲት፡

msItem.explicit: ተፈጸመ፡ ወርኃ፡ የካቲት፡ ቡሩክ፡ በሥምረተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወእግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ሎቱ፡ ስብሐት፡ ሣህሉ፡ ወምሕረቱ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ገብሩ፡ ፍቅረ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን። ለይኩን፡ ለይኩን።

msItem.title: Za-ʾaqrabku māḫleta
msItem.explicit: አምላከ፡ ምድር፡ ወሰማያት፡ አምላከ፡ ባሕር፡ ወቀላያት፡ ወአምላከ፡ ኵሉ፡ ፍጥረት። አምላኮሙ፡ አንተ፡ ለአበው፡ ቀደምት። አምላኮሙ፡ ለነቢያት፡ አምላኮሙ፡ ለሐዋርያት። አምላከ፡ ጻድቃን፡ ወሰማዕት። መሐረነ፡ ለነ፡ አምላክነ። እስመ፡ ግብረ፡ እዴከ፡ ንሕነ፡ ወኢትዝክር፡ ኵሎ፡ አበሳነ፡

extent.note: Data on leaves dimensions taken from fol. 4r.

list.item: The manuscript has been very sporadically foliated in pencil in the upper right corner. The paper flyleaves and three blank guard leaves at the beginning are not foliated. Only fols 1–6, , 99–100, and 108–110 are foliated.

The manuscript is foliated in black ink with Ethiopic numerals in the upper left corner, beginning from ፻ on fol. 1 to ፻፴፯ at the end of . The foliation the continues with ፩ at the beginning of and goes until ፸፩.

collation.signatures: Possibly one quire mark: ፲፩ in the upper left corner on fol. 4r above . No other quire marks could be observed.

layout.note: Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 4r.
layout.ab: Ruling and pricking are visible, but pricking has been partly cut off when the manuscript was bound.

handNote.seg: Clear, but not very accurate hand.
Titles, the names of Mary and Jesus, the names of the scribe and of the owner are rubricated.

item.desc: The names of the same persons as in (the scribe, the owner and members of his family) are mentioned in the supplications after the commemorations: Minās, Tawalda Madḫǝn, Fǝqra ʾIyasus, Kidāna Wald, Takla Hāymānot, Walda ʾEwosṭātewos, Walda ʾƎgziʾ, Walatta Śǝllāse, ʿĀmata Śǝllāse, Walatta Ṣǝyon, Mārtā, Walda Giyorgis, Kǝnfa Mikāʾel.
Ex libris of James Bruce glued on the inner front board, containing shelfmarks of the manuscript: 83. Aeth. Cat. 4. Bruce of Kinnaird Nº 9
A pagemark of blue textile is sewn to the headband.

item.q: ዘአስፎኒ፡ ሊቀ፡ ምኔት፡ ዘእምርት፡ ደብረ፡ አስዋን፡
sicut Abba Jacobus, Episcopus Wesimi ዘውሲም፡, memoravit
ejus historia scripta est ad XXVI Hamlê diem
qui umbra sua, sine baculo, serpentem interfecit, et stando precabatur, donec pedes ejus intumescerent
quae Abbatem Arsanium et Ausiam visitavit

binding.decoNote: European very tight binding, red leather with gilded borders. Printed on the spine: Synaxar. Tom II Cover of the inner board and first fly-leaf gilded and imprinted with geometrical pattern. The text block was trimmed and its edges were gilded. One paper fly leaf each, on which watermarks are visible, at the front and back.

bibl.title: Catalogus codicum manuscriptorum Bibliothecae Bodleianae Oxoniensis, Pars VII: Codices Aethiopici

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Updated with codicological information (foliation, layout, condition, binding) during consultation of the manuscript.
Improved binding description according to proposal by Denis Nosnitsin
